Inline comments:
In `@apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-stack.mdx`:
- Around line 330-345: The three example inputs ("First name", "Last name", and
"MRN") currently rely only on placeholders and must have visible <label>
elements for accessibility; update the markup around the inputs inside the
<hx-stack> and the standalone MRN input to include explicit <label> elements
(either wrap each input in a <label> or add a <label htmlFor="..."> paired with
an id on the corresponding <input>) so each input has a programmatically
associated, visible label rather than relying solely on placeholder text.
- Line 236: Replace the hardcoded phrase "Verified with 3 automated axe tests"
in the WCAG table cell with a generic statement (e.g., "Verified with automated
axe-core accessibility tests" or "Verified with automated accessibility tests")
so the docs keep the stable guarantee ("WCAG 2.1 AA", zero axe-core violations)
without embedding a specific test count; locate the table row containing the
text "Verified with 3 automated axe tests" in hx-stack.mdx and update that cell
accordingly.
- Around line 123-147: The standalone HTML examples instantiate the custom
element hx-stack but do not load/register it; update both example blocks (the
minimal snippets showing <hx-stack> and the nested/inline examples) to either
include a loader/import step that registers the component (e.g., a script tag
that imports the `@helix/library` module) or add a short note above each snippet
stating “assumes `@helix/library` is already loaded” so copy-pasting into a plain
.html file will work; ensure the change is applied to the other similar snippet
range referenced in the comment as well.
- Around line 111-119: The installation section currently mixes a shell and JS
snippet in one code
